mapper.insert: INSERT INTO complaints (user_id, content, reason, type, contact, consultation_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{reason}, #{type}, #{contact}, #{consultationId}, 'pending', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE complaints SET status = #{status}, handle_reason = #{reason}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('resolved', 'dismissed') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complaints WHERE status = #{status}
